meaning: n.围住,围栏,四周有篱笆或围墙的场地
examples: Within those precincts, within that enclosure, there's a large, open courtyard.
Without this enclosure, but just within the street entrance, sat a grey-haired gentleman at a small table, with a large open ledger of some kind before him.
This enclosure was so vast that the outermost wall could hardly be seen.
The organized collective work is reflected on the enclosure wall that protected the village.
Thirteen human burials were excavated within the Roman enclosure at Ebley Road in Stonehouse.
